hero.subline: Drill, projector, camping gear: from your Berlin neighborhood, booked in minutes. No hardware store, no detours.

how.title: Three steps. That's it.
how.lead: No fuss. Find what you need and get started.

steps.title: Find
steps.body: Browse listings in your neighborhood. Filter by category, price and distance.

steps.title: Book
steps.body: Availability, price and deposit are right in the listing. Book in one click. No haggling, no chat marathon.

steps.title: Pick up
steps.body: Meet, hand over, get going. With photo check and digital handover protocol.

renters.title: Use, don't own.
renters.lead: You need something for a weekend, a project, a trip. Don't buy it. Rent it.

benefits.title: Save money
benefits.body: Pay a fraction of the purchase price. No shelves full of tools that only see use twice a year.

benefits.title: Right around the corner
benefits.body: Everything local. Bike rides instead of deliveries. In-person handover instead of parcel pickup.

benefits.title: Protected
benefits.body: Verified profiles, reviews and damage protection give you the peace of mind you need.

hosts.title: Earn with what's already sitting around.
hosts.lead: Your things work for you. List what you don't need every day and earn passively.

benefits.title: Online in minutes
benefits.body: Take a photo, set a price, done. No shop, no hassle.

benefits.title: You decide
benefits.body: Availability, deposit, pickup times. All in your hands, no fixed rules.

benefits.title: Covered
benefits.body: Our protection covers damage and loss. You stay relaxed.

sustainability.title:
Buy less.
Share more.
sustainability.lead: Every shared tool is one that doesn't need to be newly produced. Here's the result.

trust.title: Trust is built in.
trust.lead: We turn strangers into neighbors. That's what our system stands for.

items.title: Reviews
items.body: Honest reviews after every transaction. No fakes, no filters.

items.title: Verified profiles
items.body: ID, phone and address are checked. You know who you're dealing with.

items.title: Personal support
items.body: Real people, not a chatbot. With questions, you message the team behind mietme directly.

items.title: Damage protection
items.body: Every verified booking is covered. We review damage claims personally, instead of leaving you hanging.

trustAnchors.title: Berlin's already in.
trustAnchors.lead: mietme has been growing at HTW Berlin since October 2022, adding the layer Berlin's sharing infrastructure was missing: private items from your neighborhood. From drills to projectors, from camping gear to game consoles.

items.label: Berliners on the waitlist
items.body: Paid launch campaign via Meta Ads and OOH posters at Alexanderplatz. Grown without big PR.

items.label: HTW KickStart scholarship
items.body: HTW Berlin has already approved mietme as worthy of funding. Reviewed by the institution we built it at.

items.label: Three years of development
items.body: No pivot hopping, no hobby idea. mietme started in HTW Berlin's entrepreneurship lab and has been through multiple iterations since.

items.name: Lena M.
items.text: Rented full camping gear for a weekend. Neighbor two streets away. Cheaper than any shop.

items.name: Jakob R.
items.text: Easily earn 120 euros a month with my drill that used to just sit there. Absurdly easy to set up.

items.name: Farah T.
items.text: Finally a platform that feels like a neighborhood. No anonymous marketplace vibes.

aboutTeaser.title: Behind mietme is a small team.
aboutTeaser.lead: mietme connects neighbors so things get used instead of sitting around. Not ownership for its own sake, but access when you need it.

meta.title: About us
meta.description: Why we're building mietme — access over ownership, local over anonymous, simple over complicated.

hero.title: Why we're building mietme.
hero.subline: One product, one idea, one simple conviction.

idea.title: Simple because it should stay simple.
idea.body: We like the idea because it's simple. Most of the things we need are already somewhere in the neighborhood. Drill, camping tent, projector, party grill. Buying is rarely the best answer, but often the fastest. mietme should change that: access instead of ownership, local instead of anonymous, simple instead of complicated. Buy less. Share more. That's the core.

cta.title: Want to join?
cta.lead: Find what you need, or rent out what's already sitting around.

items.a: Signing up is free. A small service fee applies to every booking, covering damage protection and support.
Every verified booking is covered by our damage protection. Report the damage within 24 hours and we'll take care of the rest.
In person. You meet, do a quick photo protocol in the app, and the item changes hands. Same thing on return.
No. mietme is exclusively for physical items. There are other platforms for services.

items.q: What if the host doesn't reply?
items.a: You should get a reply within 24 hours. Otherwise you book somewhere else and our support reaches out to the host.
Yes. As a host you decide how high the deposit is. It's automatically held and released after the return.

items.q: Is mietme available in my city?

finalCta.title:
Rent what you need.
Today.
finalCta.lead: No account required for browsing. In two minutes you'll find out whether someone down the street has a projector to rent.
